305
M/s Triveni Engineering and Industries Ltd. v. 
State of Uttar Pradesh & Ors.
4.7. Pursuant to the aforesaid order dated 21.09.2021, the joint 
committee conducted inspection on 08.12.2021 and submitted 
report dated 11.01.2022. After extensively referring to the 
observations, conclusions and recommendations of the joint 
committee, NGT passed the first impugned order dated 15.02.2022 
observing that the report showed violation of the environmental 
norms by the project proponent (appellant), such as, illegal 
disposal of untreated effluents etc. while stating that such violation 
was required to be remedied in terms of the recommendations 
made in the report. For the past violations, the joint committee 
was directed to assess the compensation in accordance with
